description.value:
Inspired by the anatomy of other species in the Pact Worlds, you've augmented yourself with humanoid arms, whether cybernetic or biotech, that would put even world-class bodybuilders to shame.

You gain a second pair of arms. At any time, one pair of hands is designated as your active hands. You can take the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Switch Hands] action to change your active hands. Add the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.All Hands on Deck] and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Double Draw] ancestry feats to your list of standardized ancestry feats.
